topic: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional

tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional.
tasks.hindiPrompt: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: If I had money, I would buy this house. If I were you, I would not do this. If she knew, she would come. If I had time, I would travel. If I had worked hard, I would have passed.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional.
tasks.hindiPrompt: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: If you had told me, I would have helped. If he had come early, we would have met. If I had known the mistake, I would have corrected it. If the weather were good, we would go out. If he had asked me, I would have told him.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "अगर मेरे पास कार होती, तो मैं रोज ऑफिस जाता।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: If I had a car, I would go to office every day.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "If I had time, I will travel."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: If I had time, I would travel.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional.
tasks.hindiPrompt: If Clauses / Conditionals Part 2 — Second & Third Conditional का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: If you were happy, I would be happy too. If he had paid attention, this mistake would not have happened. If I were a pilot, I would travel the world. If he had called me, I would have come.
